chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Crl. Trans. Application No.25 of 2024 (Amber Umair v. Yousuf Ali Khan Ghouri and others) __________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge __________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case 30.04.2024 Applicant in person Mr. Muhammad Anwar Mahar, DDPP for the State Mr. Waseemuddin Shaikh, advocate for the private respondents ========= The applicant by way of the instant application has sought transfer of her case to some other Court of competent jurisdiction in order to give an end to the issue of jurisdiction to be raised at the latter stage. The cognizance of the case has already been taken by the learned trial Court which alone in terms of Section 179 Cr.PC is competent to proceed with it in accordance with the law without being its transferred to any other Court; consequently, the instant Transfer Application being misconceived is dismissed accordingly. J U D G E Nadir
